extractorName.markdownDescription:
Name of extractor to use for k8s context extraction

Defines the name of the [extractor](https://doc.log10x.com/run/input/extract/) to use for k8s context extraction. To learn more see [k8s extractors](https://github.com/log-10x/modules/blob/main/pipelines/run/modules/initialize/k8s/settings.yaml) (Default: fluentK8s)

namespaceNameField.markdownDescription:
K8s namespace target field name

Specify the field name to assign with the extracted k8s [namespace](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/namespaces/) (Default: namespace)

containerNameField.markdownDescription:
K8s container name target field name

Specify the field name to assign with the extracted k8s [container name](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/) (Default: container)

podNameField.markdownDescription:
K8s pod name target field name

Specify the field name to assign with the extracted k8s [pod name](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/) (Default: pod)
